next_actions: Keep the chart-transition line in memo-only posture and design one token-invariant chart-transition task.
Do not reopen execution on the current chart-transition task after the token-renaming robustness failure.
Preserve the original chart-transition packet and full symbolic fairness ladder as internal reference evidence only.
risks_or_blocks: Novelty remains conditional until empirical ablation results are collected.
Benchmark breadth risk remains if phase-1 includes only text classification.
Cloud provider API/platform changes may require periodic strategy updates.
Current matrix is fully real-mode but based on small handcrafted local datasets.
Local handcrafted datasets may not reflect production distributions.
Quandela remote path currently supports a provider-accepted minimal circuit and reduced slice size rather than a matched full benchmark matrix.
IBM open-instance backend availability and latency may vary across sessions.
Matched remote evidence is still limited to one dataset, one seed, and non-identical circuit families.
Current `V2` asymmetry across providers may be seed-sensitive and should not be over-interpreted.
The Quandela adapter currently has a provider-rejected parameter regime that blocks some seeds.
Retry/cache-reset hardening improved but did not eliminate Quandela coverage gaps.
Sample-level skip policy still leaves some Quandela seed/variant combinations non-viable.
Direct Quandela execution depends on maintaining sufficient provider credits.
Scaleway fallback will introduce a new account/project/API-key onboarding dependency if we keep it on the roadmap.
Official docs still do not expose an exact credit-per-run formula for direct Quandela usage.
The chart-transition line is currently blocked on token-convention sensitivity; any future restart must make token identity a nuisance variable by construction.
last_test_run: Execution-only packet for token-renaming hardening on synthetic_dual_chart_transition_manifold_response
notes: S303-S305 completed. The chart-transition witness failed the fixed token-renaming hardening step on the primary metric; the line is back in memo-only posture with a token-invariant task-design requirement.
